title: Nursery Rhyme. DCLI. Relics.
content:
Around the green gravel the grass grows green,
        And all the pretty maids are plain to be seen;
        Wash them with milk, and clothe them with silk,
        And write their names with a pen and ink.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. DCLI. Relics."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
